design_decisions.thmsmith_propose_topic: Flagship topic with hand-derived nonroutine object: sharp influence-function non-equivalence frontier for four named staggered-DiD estimators: Borusyak-Jaravel-Spiess imputation (ReStud 2024), Sun-Abraham interaction-weighted (JoE 2021), Callaway-Sant'Anna group-time doubly robust (JoE 2021), and Wooldridge cohort-time saturated TWFE (2021). Pre-anchor check: closest banked proposal is eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1, which almost cleared flagship but failed because K_star was vague/undefined and the projection-loss object was not uniquely specified. Our theorem is not that because this run must replace the vague threshold with a concrete finite cohort-event IF contrast matrix C(pi,Sigma,G,T), computed from named observable cohort shares and pre-period covariance primitives, and an explicit 3-cohort x 4-period witness where the four estimators identify the same ATT but have provably different influence-function projections and variances. If the proposal becomes a generic FWL/projection identity, a low-rank slogan, or an efficiency claim without the contrast matrix and worked witness, pivot or stop early. Required kernel: an iff frontier C tau = 0 for first-order IF equivalence, a strict-gap formula ||C tau||^2_{Omega}, and a corrected efficient projection map recovering the BJS IF.

proposed_from.topic: Flagship topic with hand-derived nonroutine object: sharp influence-function non-equivalence frontier for four named staggered-DiD estimators: Borusyak-Jaravel-Spiess imputation (ReStud 2024), Sun-Abraham interaction-weighted (JoE 2021), Callaway-Sant'Anna group-time doubly robust (JoE 2021), and Wooldridge cohort-time saturated TWFE (2021). Our theorem is not that because this run must replace the vague threshold with a concrete finite cohort-event IF contrast matrix C(pi,Sigma,G,T), computed from named observable cohort shares and pre-period covariance primitives, and an explicit 3-cohort x 4-period witness where the four estimators identify the same ATT but have provably different influence-function projections and variances. If the proposal becomes a generic FWL/projection identity, a low-rank slogan, or an efficiency claim without the contrast matrix and worked witness, pivot or stop early. proposed_from.novelty_justification: {"repo_axis":"Closest in-catalogue prior art remains doc/API.md Q1_StaggeredMinimalBasis and the failed banked eid_bjs_efficient_event_study proposal. The revision keeps the same kernel but patches the banked blocker by replacing the vague Gamma/K_star object with C_m=M_mE_mB-L{EIF}, stacking the BJS row explicitly, and deriving Exhibit 9.1 from selector and nuisance-design primitives.","published_axis":"Published BJS, SA, CS, Wooldridge, and Chen-Sant'Anna-Xie provide estimator-specific identification, equivalence, contamination, or EIF benchmarks. The proposed delta is a necessary-and-sufficient all-four primitive IF frontier plus a quotient variance-gap formula and worked finite witness for equal ATT targets with unequal IF projections."}
seed_list: Construct C(pi,Sigma,G,T) and conjecture the iff IF-equivalence frontier C tau=0 for BJS, SA, CS, and Wooldridge on one ATT target.
Prove the strict variance-gap identity Var(IF_alt)-Var(IF_BJS)=||C_m tau||^2_Omega with a stacked four-estimator norm.
Give a 3-cohort by 4-period symbolic witness where all four estimators identify the same ATT but have unequal IF projections.
Define unique BJS, SA, CS, and Wooldridge nuisance-design matrices Z_m and a corrected projection map recovering the BJS IF.
Rebase the frontier against the published efficient influence-function benchmark and characterize joint attainment by all four estimators.
Extend the contrast frontier to pre-period and post-period event-study diagnostic coefficients, separating plotting asymmetry from IF inequivalence.
Characterize when Wooldridge saturated TWFE and BJS imputation are IF-equivalent outside complete-panel time-invariant-control cases.
Derive an estimator-duality package: plug-in estimator for C tau, variance estimator for ||C tau||^2_Omega, and asymptotic diagnostic rate conjecture.
Give a generic open-class separation theorem showing C tau != 0 on an open set of staggered designs, not just at one witness.
Replace the failed K_star spectral-threshold object with a finite rank condition on C(pi,Sigma,G,T) and prove equivalence to the contrast frontier.

seed_details.one_line: Construct C(pi,Sigma,G,T) and conjecture the iff IF-equivalence frontier C tau=0 for BJS, SA, CS, and Wooldridge on one ATT target.

anchor_paper.author: prior CausalSmith proposal
anchor_paper.claim: Prior proposal left a Gamma_m tau=0 IF-equivalence frontier with necessity unresolved.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: BJS and estimator m are influence-function equivalent for theta_a if and only if Gamma_m(pi,Sigma,a)tau=0

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: Default-to-FWL risk avoided by making C(pi,Sigma,G,T) the focal primitive matrix and requiring necessity.
seed_details.referee_objection: This is immediate from the failed Gamma_m proposal because C is just Gamma renamed.
seed_details.rebuttal: The seed replaces vague Gamma/K_star with a specified stacked four-estimator contrast matrix and an explicit witness; necessity remains the novel claim.
seed_details.strict_delta: This is not eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1 because the closest comparator left necessity of Gamma_m and uniqueness of Z_M unresolved.
seed_details.routine_collapse_check: PASS: routine projection algebra creates a new computable matrix, iff frontier, strict norm, and worked witness.

adversarial_referee.instance: Necessity of C tau=0 may be asserted rather than proved.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: Necessity is isolated as Conjecture 1 with proof route via perturbations along nonzero contrast rows.

adversarial_referee.instance: BJS efficiency may not imply BJS baseline for every estimator class.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: The draft treats BJS baseline as an assumption and labels the benchmark issue as scope.

adversarial_referee.instance: A single 3x4 matrix could be hand tuned.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: The exhibit has positive shares, nonsingular Sigma, nonconstant tau, and distinct non-normalized loadings.

seed_details.one_line: Prove the strict variance-gap identity Var(IF_alt)-Var(IF_BJS)=||C_m tau||^2_Omega with a stacked four-estimator norm.

anchor_paper.author: prior CausalSmith reviewer
anchor_paper.claim: Reviewer requested a symbolic example with positive K_e for one estimator and zero for another.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: Add a small T=3 or T=4 symbolic example showing K_e positive for one named estimator and zero for another

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: Efficiency-only risk avoided by requiring a primitive norm identity and not just a ranking.
seed_details.referee_objection: This follows from BJS efficiency by Pythagoras.
seed_details.rebuttal: BJS efficiency does not name the three alternative IF contrast matrices or the tau-indexed strict-gap norm.
seed_details.strict_delta: This is not BJS efficiency because the claimed object is the estimator-specific residual contrast norm across SA, CS, and W.
seed_details.routine_collapse_check: PASS: projection tools produce a new variance-gap functional with observable primitive inputs.

adversarial_referee.instance: Variance gap could lack computable evaluation map.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: The proposal defines Omega_m and C_m from finite covariance and loading primitives.

adversarial_referee.instance: Chen-Sant'Anna-Xie EIF work may already provide the bound.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: The checklist flags this as a rebasing comparator for reviewer verification.

adversarial_referee.instance: Only one event-time ATT is named.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: Locked parameters target one scalar theta_a; family extension is a follow-up seed.

seed_details.one_line: Give a 3-cohort by 4-period symbolic witness where all four estimators identify the same ATT but have unequal IF projections.

anchor_paper.author: prior CausalSmith reviewer
anchor_paper.claim: Reviewer requested a concrete worked matrix separating a known estimator pair.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: Add a concrete three-period, two-cohort worked matrix for Gamma_m and show which known estimator pair separates

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: Witness-trivial risk addressed by positive shares, nonsingular covariance, nonconstant tau, and no collapsed treatment arm.
seed_details.referee_objection: A worked witness is only an example, not a publishable theorem.
seed_details.rebuttal: It supports the flagship iff and strict-gap conjectures by exhibiting the focal object from primitives.
seed_details.strict_delta: This is not a generic counterexample because it is tied to named estimators and computes C tau and variances.
seed_details.routine_collapse_check: PASS: the witness is an exhibit for a non-equivalence frontier, not the whole contribution.

adversarial_referee.instance: The loadings might be invented rather than derived from estimators.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: Draft flags derivation of L_m from published estimating equations as the main open scope issue.

adversarial_referee.instance: A single witness lacks generic-class promotion.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: The witness is paired with Conjecture 1's full iff frontier.

adversarial_referee.instance: Equal row sums may not mean equal ATT estimands.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: The locked setup forces common target weights; row sums are only the homogeneous sanity check.

seed_details.one_line: Define unique BJS, SA, CS, and Wooldridge nuisance-design matrices Z_m and a corrected projection map recovering the BJS IF.

anchor_paper.author: prior CausalSmith bank README
anchor_paper.claim: The failed proposal lacked a unique projection-loss object across four estimators.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: K_star=0 corner case undefined, Z_M projection loss not uniquely specified across the 4 estimators

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: Decomposition without correction avoided by requiring a corrected projection map to BJS.
seed_details.referee_objection: This is bookkeeping of design matrices, not a theorem.
seed_details.rebuttal: The unique projection map is needed to identify when Wooldridge recovers the BJS IF and when it fails.
seed_details.strict_delta: This is not Wooldridge equivalence because it characterizes failures outside the restricted equivalence class.
seed_details.routine_collapse_check: PASS: the output is a unique residual projection operator, not FWL notation alone.

adversarial_referee.instance: Claims correction but may only decompose Z_m.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: The seed explicitly requires a corrected projection map recovering BJS.

adversarial_referee.instance: May only give sufficient matrix restrictions.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: Should be drafted as iff to stay flagship.
Z_m dimensions and covariance primitives are part of the deliverable.

seed_details.one_line: Rebase the frontier against the published efficient influence-function benchmark and characterize joint attainment by all four estimators.

anchor_paper.author: prior CausalSmith reviewer
anchor_paper.claim: Reviewer warned that ChenSantAnnaXie2025 EIFs may already supply the benchmark geometry.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: Rebase the frontier on ChenSantAnnaXie2025's EIF: define Gamma_m as the gap between each named estimator IF

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: Anchor-drift risk is the point; seed directly rebases against the possible published EIF comparator.
seed_details.referee_objection: ChenSantAnnaXie2025 already derives closed-form EIFs and efficient bounds.
seed_details.rebuttal: The seed asks for joint attainment and quotient equality across four named estimators, not the EIF formula alone.
seed_details.strict_delta: This is not the EIF paper because it constructs estimator-specific gaps to the benchmark and joint-attainment conditions.
seed_details.routine_collapse_check: PASS if joint-attainment frontier is nontrivial; otherwise downgrade after paper check.

adversarial_referee.instance: Closest missing paper may already close it.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: Reviewer must verify; draft uses BJS baseline instead to avoid overclaiming this seed.

seed_details.one_line: Extend the contrast frontier to pre-period and post-period event-study diagnostic coefficients, separating plotting asymmetry from IF inequivalence.

anchor_paper.author: prior CausalSmith rejected angle
anchor_paper.claim: Rejected angle identified extra pre-period restrictions as active IF-changing restrictions.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: when additional pre-treatment periods change the efficient influence function rather than serving only as diagnostics

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: CATE/diagnostic variant risk mitigated by requiring IF-level criterion for pre and post coefficients.
seed_details.referee_objection: This is just Roth's event-study plot asymmetry restated in IF language.
seed_details.rebuttal: The seed gives a finite rank/projection condition for four estimators, not a descriptive plotting warning.
seed_details.strict_delta: This is not Roth's note because it targets first-order IF equivalence rather than visual coefficient differences.
seed_details.routine_collapse_check: PASS if finite rank condition is explicit; otherwise field-tier.

adversarial_referee.instance: Roth note may not concern the same estimators.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: Use Roth only as diagnostic consumer, not sole comparator.

adversarial_referee.instance: Pre and post coefficients form a vector family.
adversarial_referee.rebuttal_or_downgrade: Seed names the coefficient family jointly.

adversarial_referee.instance: Need estimator and rate if panel flagship.

seed_details.one_line: Characterize when Wooldridge saturated TWFE and BJS imputation are IF-equivalent outside complete-panel time-invariant-control cases.

anchor_paper.author: Wooldridge
anchor_paper.claim: Wooldridge develops ETWFE/imputation equivalences in structured panel settings.

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: Single-comparator equivalence caps at field unless paired with BJS restrictions and necessity.
seed_details.referee_objection: Wooldridge already proves the relevant equivalence.
seed_details.rebuttal: The gap is outside the restricted equivalence class and at IF, not point-estimate, level.

seed_details.one_line: Derive an estimator-duality package: plug-in estimator for C tau, variance estimator for ||C tau||^2_Omega, and asymptotic diagnostic rate conjecture.

anchor_paper.author: Borusyak, Jaravel, and Spiess
anchor_paper.claim: BJS connect imputation to robust and efficient estimation in staggered event studies.

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: Identification-only panel risk avoided by adding estimator and rate conjecture.
seed_details.referee_objection: This is a diagnostic implementation of the frontier, not new identification.
seed_details.rebuttal: It becomes publishable only if paired with the C tau iff frontier; alone it is field-tier.

seed_details.one_line: Give a generic open-class separation theorem showing C tau != 0 on an open set of staggered designs, not just at one witness.

anchor_paper.author: prior CausalSmith reviewer
anchor_paper.claim: Reviewer requested finite symbolic evidence that separation is not promissory.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: Add a small T=3 or T=4 symbolic example showing K_e positive for one named estimator and zero for another

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: Witness-on-single-law risk avoided by promoting to an open set around the worked witness.
seed_details.referee_objection: Open-set claim follows by continuity once one witness exists.
seed_details.rebuttal: It is a strengthening corollary, not the flagship kernel; useful only with explicit C and Omega.
seed_details.strict_delta: This is not a hand-tuned witness because it characterizes a neighborhood in primitive law space.
seed_details.routine_collapse_check: lands; downgrade to field-tier unless paired with the main frontier.

seed_details.one_line: Replace the failed K_star spectral-threshold object with a finite rank condition on C(pi,Sigma,G,T) and prove equivalence to the contrast frontier.

anchor_paper.author: prior CausalSmith bank README
anchor_paper.claim: The prior K_star object was undefined and projection loss was not unique.
anchor_paper.verbatim_quote: K_star=0 corner case undefined, Z_M projection loss not uniquely specified across the 4 estimators

seed_details.anti_pattern_check: Low-rank slogan risk is explicit; seed requires rank condition equivalent to C tau frontier.
seed_details.referee_objection: This recreates the rejected spectral-threshold angle.
seed_details.rebuttal: The rank condition is subordinate to a concrete C matrix and is not the headline object.
seed_details.strict_delta: This is not K_star because rank(C) is computed after estimator-specific IF loadings are fixed.
seed_details.routine_collapse_check: lands; downgrade to field-tier if rank is only notation for C tau=0.

proposed_from.literature_map:
Borusyak-Jaravel-Spiess (ReStud 2024) derive a robust finite-sample efficient imputation estimator and frame earlier robust staggered-DiD estimators as having unknown efficiency properties.
Sun-Abraham (JoE 2021) show dynamic TWFE lead/lag coefficients can be contaminated by treatment effects from other relative periods and propose interaction-weighted event-study estimation.
Callaway-Sant'Anna (JoE 2021) build a group-time ATT framework separating identification, aggregation, and estimation/inference, including doubly robust estimands.
Wooldridge (Econometrics Journal 2023) develops saturated/extended TWFE and pooled-regression approaches that can coincide with imputation in restricted settings.
de Chaisemartin-D'Haultfoeuille (AER 2020) and Goodman-Bacon (JoE 2021) provide negative-weight and timing-comparison diagnostics explaining why standard TWFE can fail under heterogeneous effects.
Roth-Sant'Anna-Bilinski-Poe (JoE 2023) synthesize modern DiD and stress that pre-trend tests and estimator choice involve distinct identifying and inferential issues.
The closest live gap is not identification of group-time ATTs, which is well covered, but IF-level equivalence and variance comparison after valid estimators are forced onto the same ATT target.
Across these papers, the unresolved object is a finite primitive contrast matrix linking cohort shares, untreated covariance structure, event-time aggregation, and IF projections.

banked_reason: D-0.5 NO-PASS after 5 angles under flagship target: the best angle briefly reached REVISE@flagship but all surviving versions left the IF contrast matrix, quotient norm, or corrected projection as asserted/promissory objects; final review classified the kernel as field-tier definitional contrast algebra.
